introduce/quick_start/index.po.:ref:`如何避免 GPU 进入低功耗模式导致推理变慢？`: :ref:`如何避免 GPU 进入低功耗模式导致推理变慢？`
introduce/quick_start/index.po.:ref:`如何开启浏览器的硬件加速以避免浏览器卡顿？`: :ref:`如何开启浏览器的硬件加速以避免浏览器卡顿？`
introduce/quick_start/index.po.如需更换后端地址，可在登录页点击 **Change Host Address（更: To switch to a different backend, click **Change Host Address** on the login page, enter the backend URL in the dialog, and save.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.登录后，点击右上角的 **齿轮图标** 进入 **设置** 页面。设置页左侧分为: After logging in, click the **gear icon** at the top right to open **Settings**. The left side of Settings is split into **Team**, **Manage Models**, **System Settings**, and more.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.在左侧展开 **系统设置**，选择 **语言**，即可在 **系统语言** 中切: Expand **System Settings** on the left and pick **Language**; the **System Language** drop-down switches the UI (e.g. ``English`` / ``中文``). The choice is persisted and survives a system restart.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.在主页点击 **训练PCBA**（注册新的 PCBA/产品），进入 **自动编程: From Home, click **Train PCBA** to register a new PCBA / product and open the **Auto-Programming wizard**. The wizard runs through five steps: **Basic Info**, **Place PCB on Conveyor**, **Get Dimensions**, **Capture**, and **Add CAD (Optional)**.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.输入 **产品名称**；在 **自动编程检测类型** 中按需勾选关注的检测项（如: Enter the **Product Name**; check the inspection types you care about under **Auto-Programming inspection types** (Body, Polarity, Solder Joint, Glue on Pad, IC Lead, Text, and so on). If needed, enable **Bridge** under **Auto-Programming parameters** and set the **Adjacency Distance (pixels)** threshold. Click **Next**.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.左侧还可在 **设置（Recipe）** 与 **元件（Component）**: The left side also toggles between the **Recipe** view and the **Component** view.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.确认全部元件框与属性无误后，在 **元件列表** 上方点击 **训练** 按钮启: Once every component box and property is verified, click **Train** above the component list to start model training — about a minute. When training finishes, click **Auto-generate Inspection Parameters**; the system derives an initial parameter set from the current template and the training result. To evaluate every component at once, click the **triangle arrow** above the list.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.返回主页：点击左上角 Logo 回到主页，点击 **新建检测任务**。在弹窗中完: Return to Home: click the logo at the top-left, then click **New Inspection Task**. In the dialog, configure:
introduce/quick_start/index.po.**选择一个 PCBA**：选择已编程的产品；: **Select a PCBA**: pick a programmed product.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.**选择任务模式**：选择任务模式（如自动连续运行任务）；: **Task mode**: pick a mode (e.g. Continuous automatic).
introduce/quick_start/index.po.**以演示模式运行**：对同一块 PCB 自动连续运行检测，每隔约 5 秒触发一: **Run in demo mode**: runs inspection continuously on the same PCB, triggering every ~5 seconds. Useful for learning the review / feedback flow or demoing on-site, without repeatedly hitting trigger.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.按空格键，或按设备上的 **进板** 实体按键：进板并立即开始检测。更多快捷键请: Press the spacebar or the **PCB In** hardware button to load a board and start inspection immediately. See :ref:`快捷键` for the full keyboard reference.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.右侧信息栏：实时显示产品统计（合格/不合格）、元件合格率/不良率/误报率与检测时: The right-hand panel shows live product statistics (Pass / Fail), component pass / defect / false-positive rates, and inspection time — switchable between Board and Sub-board scope.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.检测到缺陷的元件会被标记，可查看放大图、定位框、缺陷类型及判定依据，并立即反馈。: Defective components are flagged; you can examine the zoomed image, the localization box, the defect type, and the deciding feature, and submit feedback immediately. Feedback flows into the dataset for ongoing optimization.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.在主页点击 **工作列表** 进入 **数据分析报告**。页面包含 **总结**: Click **Worklist** on Home to open the **Data Analysis Report**. The page exposes the **Summary**, **Inspection Results**, **Defective Components**, and **False-Positive Components** tabs, with time-range presets — Today / Yesterday / This Week / This Month / This Year.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.**总结** 提供 OK/NG 数量与比例、告警/误报的 PPM、DPU 等总览: **Summary** offers overview metrics — OK / NG counts and ratios, alerted / false-positive PPM, DPU, and an NG / OK ratio chart.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.切换到 **检测结果**，可查看每次检测记录：PCBA 名称、序列号、元件数、不: Switch to **Inspection Results** to browse each inspection record: PCBA name, serial number, component count, defective / alerted component counts, start and end times. Click **View** on a row to enter the review detail.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.在复检详情中，左侧列出不良元件，中部与右侧展示整板及缺陷的放大图、定位框、缺陷类: In the review detail, the NG components are listed on the left; the whole-board view, the zoomed defect image, the localization box, the defect type, and the deciding feature appear in the center and right, with feedback submission inline.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.提交的反馈会写入数据集，用于后续再训练与参数自适应迭代。: Submitted feedback flows into the dataset for retraining and adaptive parameter iteration.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.反馈写入数据集后，回到产品编程页面重新训练并评估，针对仍为红色的异常元件微调参数: After feedback flows into the dataset, return to the programming page, retrain and evaluate, then fine-tune the parameters for any components still showing red — that completes one iteration.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.以上即为快速开始全部流程，感谢您的使用。后续更多功能与更详细的说明请继续阅读完整: That's the complete Quick Start flow. Thanks for using the system — read on through the full user manual for additional features and deeper documentation.

introduce/overview/index.po.本页面介绍 AOI 系统的整体架构、顶层界面导航逻辑，以及首次启动时的登录操作与: This page introduces the AOI system's overall architecture, the top-level navigation, and the login flow and startup screens you'll see on first boot. Written for every role — Administrator, Operator, and Programmer.
introduce/overview/index.po.浏览器直接访问系统根路径（默认 ``http://localhost:3005/: Open the system root path in a browser (default ``http://localhost:3005/``), or click the desktop launcher and the browser opens automatically. If you are not logged in, you are redirected to the login page.
introduce/overview/index.po.登录后，所有页面共享一个固定的顶部导航栏（由 `ContainerLayout`: After login, every page shares a persistent top navigation bar (provided by `ContainerLayout`). The bar contains:
introduce/overview/index.po.**左上角 Logo / 系统名称**（显示 **AOI系统**）：点击可随时从: **Logo / system name on the top-left** (displays **AOI System**): clicking it returns to Home (``/home``) from any page. On **Settings** and **Worklist**, the page label (such as **Settings** or **Worklist**) appears next to the name; on the product programming page, the name is suffixed with the product being programmed.
introduce/overview/index.po.**右上角功能区**：从左到右依次为磁盘用量指示器、**齿轮图标**（进入 **: **Top-right utilities**: left to right — disk-usage indicator, **gear icon** (opens **Settings**), and the current logged-in user name.
introduce/overview/index.po.检测会话运行期间，点击齿轮图标会弹出提示，告知设置暂不可用；需先停止检测任务后再: While an inspection session is running, clicking the gear icon shows a notice that Settings is unavailable; stop the inspection first.
introduce/overview/index.po.**登录** 按钮：提交凭据，验证通过后跳转至主页（``/home``）。: **Login** button: submits the credentials; on success the page redirects to Home (``/home``).
introduce/overview/index.po.**更改主机地址** 按钮：打开主机地址配置弹窗，用于修改后端服务器地址（默认: **Change Host Address** button: opens the host-address dialog to change the backend server address (default ``http://localhost:8000/``). To access from a different machine, replace ``localhost`` with that machine's IP.
introduce/overview/index.po.界面语言可在登录后于 系统设置 → 语言 中切换（中文 / 英文）。: The UI language can be switched after login under **System Settings → Language** (Chinese / English).
introduce/overview/index.po.系统内置三种用户角色，每种角色对应不同的操作权限：: Three built-in roles ship with the system; each role carries different permissions:
introduce/overview/index.po.**管理员（ADMIN）**：拥有全部权限，包括 **团队** 管理（创建/删除: **Administrator (ADMIN)**: every permission — **Team** management (create / delete accounts, assign roles), every System Settings item (System Configuration, Capture Module, Model Updater, Programming Default Parameters, Language, Host, Calibration, About, Log), and every action on Home (including the **Train PCBA** programming entry and the **Worklist**).
introduce/overview/index.po.**编程人员（PROGRAMMER）**：可使用产品编程（**训练PCBA**）: **Programmer (PROGRAMMER)**: access to product programming (**Train PCBA**) and inspection features, plus most of System Settings (System Configuration, Capture Module, Model Updater, Programming Default Parameters, Language, Host, Calibration, About, Log). The **Team** management page is not accessible.
introduce/overview/index.po.**操作员（OPERATOR）**：仅可执行检测操作（启动/停止检测任务、查看工: **Operator (OPERATOR)**: can only run inspection (start / stop inspection tasks, view the Worklist). The product programming entry is hidden, and most advanced System Settings options (System Configuration, Capture Module, Model Updater, Programming Default Parameters, and so on) are unavailable.
introduce/overview/index.po.管理员账户在系统部署时提供，默认用户名为 **admin**。账户管理请进入设置: An administrator account is provided at deployment time; the default username is **admin**. Account management lives under **Settings → Team** (Administrator only).
introduce/overview/index.po.系统首次启动或后端服务尚未就绪时，浏览器会进入 **系统初始化中…** 等待页面: On the first boot, or while the backend is not yet ready, the browser lands on the **System initializing…** waiting page (route ``/system-initializing``). The page shows initialization progress / connection status and offers two actions:
introduce/overview/index.po.**刷新（Refresh）**：重新加载页面，重新尝试连接后端。: **Refresh**: reload the page and retry the backend connection.
introduce/overview/index.po.**更改主机地址（Change Host Address）**：在后端地址填写有: **Change Host Address**: opens the host-address dialog to reconfigure when the backend address is wrong.
introduce/overview/index.po.当后端初始化完成后，系统将自动根据登录状态跳转：令牌有效则直接进入主页，令牌已过: Once the backend finishes initializing, the system redirects automatically based on auth state — a valid token routes to Home; an expired token routes to the login page.
introduce/overview/index.po.检测会话进行中，点击顶部导航栏的 Logo（返回主页）或齿轮图标（进入设置）时，: While an inspection session is running, clicking the top-bar logo (Home) or the gear icon (Settings) — and you are currently on the Review page with an outstanding manual confirmation (`require_manual_inspection_result`) — surfaces a confirmation dialog first, so accidental navigation can't lose inspection data.
introduce/overview/index.po.角色权限在登录时由服务器签发的 JWT 令牌确定，切换权限需重新以对应账户登录。: Role permissions are stamped into the JWT token issued by the server at login; switching permissions requires logging back in as the appropriate account.
